articles.headline: Buccaneers Draft Profile: T.J. Parker, Edge, Clemson
articles.description: Clemson's T.J. Parker could be Tampa's edge-rushing answer. Will the Buccaneers prioritize this dynamic defender in the draft?

articles.headline: Some communities are enduring unprecedented long waits on federal disaster requests, and Democrat-led states say they’re being denied
articles.description: About 15 requests for assistance from others states and tribes for extreme weather events this year and last seem to be pending, along with three appeals of previous denials.

articles.headline: 2026 NFL mock draft roundup: Saints linked to multiple wide receivers
articles.description: Who are the New Orleans Saints picking in the latest mock drafts? Almost half of them link the Saints to wide receivers inside the top 10 picks.

articles.headline: When to Visit Disney’s Hollywood Studios for 1/10 Crowds in Summer 2026!
articles.description: Disney’s Hollywood Studios will soon have its lowest crowd date of the first 8 months of 2026, and perhaps #1 of the entire year once the dust settles. Here’s when to visit for almost guaranteed 1/10 crowd levels, pros & cons of doing this day, plus a list of…
